title: Divide Array in Sets of K Consecutive Numbers
titleCn: 划分数组为连续数字的集合

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,3,4,4,5,6], k = 4 Output: true Explanation: Array can be divided into [1,2,3,4] and [3,4,5,6].
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Array can be divided into [1,2,3,4] and [3,4,5,6].

testcases.input: nums = [3,2,1,2,3,4,3,4,5,9,10,11], k = 3 Output: true Explanation: Array can be divided into [1,2,3] , [2,3,4] , [3,4,5] and [9,10,11].
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Array can be divided into [1,2,3] , [2,3,4] , [3,4,5] and [9,10,11].

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4], k = 3 Output: false Explanation: Each array should be divided in subarrays of size 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: Each array should be divided in subarrays of size 3.
